expectations.evidence: Response says 'Loaded docs/plans/design.md into plan mode' and displays the System Design Document content.

expectations.text: Metadata stores FULL relative path (docs/plans/design.md, NOT just design.md)
expectations.evidence: plan-mode-content.md starts with '<!-- project-plan-source: docs/plans/design.md, status: draft -->' — full relative path is preserved.
Neither response.md nor plan-mode-content.md contain YAML front matter delimiters or status/title fields.
Response shows '# System Design Document', the overview, and the 4 components list.
